use_cases: Display employee bonus and incentive metrics on analytics dashboards
Show financial performance indicators with animated decorative elements in SaaS applications
Create interactive metric cards with hover-reveal details in analytics platforms
Build decorative circular dot visualizations for dashboard cards
Provide accessible animated card components with reduced motion support
ai_summary: A customizable dashboard metrics card component featuring animated circular dot patterns, gradient blur effects, and entrance animations powered by Framer Motion. Displays bonus and incentive values with a glassmorphism-inspired aesthetic. Includes accessibility support via useReducedMotion hook and supports hover interactions for revealing additional details. Designed for SaaS and fintech dashboard applications requiring visually engaging data display components.
